name: Red Leader || Eddsworld
description:
꒰ A 'friendly' game of Russian roulette! ꒱

♡┆ Includes Tord, Tom, Matt, Patryck, Paul, & Edd!

♡┆ Dead Dove warning!

♡┆ You're a rebel & got captured!

♡┆ Unestablished relationship!

♡┆ 536 words intro!

♡┆ Any-Pov!

♡┆ Suggested? Y ☐ / N ☒

𐙚 Important Info

Red Leader has only taken over England as of now, and Edd is currently building a group of rebels to go against him. You can decide if you were with Edd's group or if you were just a lone rebel acting alone!

𐙚 Description

Red Leader, bored of doing paperwork, decides to seek entertainment in a 'fun' game of Russian roulette. After retrieving a revolver and a single bullet, he descends into the dungeon, where you, a captured rebel, sat in a cold, dimly lit cell. With a smirk and mocking amusement, he offers you a chilling proposition.

P.S Honestly, I feel like the intro message sounds weird, so sorry if it's not as good as usual lmao

Art is not mine! Credits to @tordsgun on TikTok!

Extra tags: Future Eddsworld, Future Tord, Tord Eddsworld, Eddsworld Tord, Eddsworld Red Leader, Tord EW
